description_long: This kiosk features a sleek, modern design with a large, slightly tilted rectangular digital display mounted on a sculpted, S-shaped pedestal base. The display appears to be touch-enabled, showing a high-resolution urban map interface, suggesting interactive functionality for wayfinding or information. The pedestal is primarily white with a contrasting dark central support, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the base is branded with the hashtag '#bmby', indicating a commercial or promotional purpose. The overall construction is streamlined, with no visible windows, doors, or additional compartments, emphasizing its role as a digital information point. The materials appear to be a combination of metal, plastic, and glass, contributing to its robust yet refined appearance.
description: A modern, interactive digital kiosk with a large touchscreen display on a sculpted pedestal base, branded with '#bmby'. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban information or wayfinding.
description_view_0: Angled side view showing the tilted touchscreen display and the S-shaped pedestal base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, continuous curve of the pedestal and the flat back of the display.
description_view_2: Opposite angled side view, again showing the tilted display and the pedestal's curvature.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the interactive screen with urban map interface and the '#bmby' branding on the base.
attribute_signage_type: printed logo on the front base with text '#bmby'
attribute_roof_design: flat, integrated with the display, no overhangs or decorative elements
